positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a whimsical, bioluminescent forest scene viewed from above, showing the network of glowing roots and vibrant flora. The central focus is a large, stylized crescent moon nestled among the canopy, surrounded by geometric, repeating patterns of glowing leaves and stylized mushrooms. Use a color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and pops of neon cyan. The style should be clean, vector-art inspired line work mixed with soft digital painting, ensuring excellent silhouettes and clear separation of elements for print application. Perfect composition for a central, square apparel print, highly decorative, minimalist yet complex.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, malformed, noise, extra limbs, cartoon, photo, realism, blurry background, low resolution
